mapper.select: SELECT usc.id, usc.app_user_id AS appUserId, usc.kakao_place_id AS kakaoPlaceId, usc.saved_type AS savedType, usc.created_at AS createdAt, usc.updated_at AS updatedAt, c.place_name AS placeName, c.category_name AS categoryName, c.phone, c.address_name AS addressName, c.road_address_name AS roadAddressName, c.latitude, c.longitude, c.place_url AS placeUrl, c.last_fetched_at AS lastFetchedAt, c.next_refresh_at AS nextRefreshAt FROM user_saved_cafe usc INNER JOIN cafe c ON c.kakao_place_id = usc.kakao_place_id WHERE usc.app_user_id = #{appUserId} ORDER BY usc.created_at DESC, usc.id DESC
